title: KandyToys Battle Knight Toy War Hammers | Medieval Knight Fancy Dress Costume Accessories | Assorted Designs
features: Epic Battles Await: Arm your young hero for thrilling make believe battles and quests with this incredible toy war axe that fuels imaginative play.
Adventure Ready: With a design that mirrors legendary weapons of lore, this toy war axe is perfect for unleashing a world of epic adventures.
A Gateway to Imagination: This toy war axe unlocks the door to a realm of endless adventures, where bravery knows no bounds and heroes rise to the occasion.
Cosplay Fun: Elevate costume parties and imaginative playdates with this awesome toy war axe, transforming your child into a fearless warrior.
Design: Either a bronze or silver design will be sent, one at random.
description: From the brand Previous page Here at KandyToys we have a huge range of toys brought to you with over 40 years of experience. We're home to a number of household brands including M.Y and NALU, and based down in Devon! We've got everything from unicorns and dinosaurs to paddle boards and rollerskates. Whether it's traditional games and fun indoors or adventures outside, we've got something for everyone!
